title: Lycoming
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Lyco}}
The '''''Lycoming''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Quarantine Enforcement Cruiser]] that picked up the ''[[Zicreex]]'' after it took off from [[Nim Drovis]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
